skills.purpose: Translate qualification, decision, design-seed and redesign-brief into bounded redesign direction for buildable website demo cases.
triggers: buildable decision needs bounded redesign direction
page scope or section emphasis must stay defensible
conversion guidance is needed without widening policy boundaries
boundaries: no fake CMS or CRM logic
notes: Do not use for SKIP or AUDIT_ONLY as buildable conversion proposals.
Outputs remain assistive guidance and do not replace structured artifacts.

skills.purpose: Provide concise, concrete and evidence-based service-business copy guidance within already bounded redesign scope.
triggers: headlines, CTA or trust copy needs project-specific wording rules
service-business copy must stay factual and compact
source material is partial and placeholders or assumptions need explicit handling
boundaries: no fabricated prices, licenses or staff
notes: Use placeholders, assumptions or approval triggers when evidence is insufficient.
Keep wording compatible with preserved external flow.

skills.purpose: Support before/after analysis and structured review dossier preparation for audit-only and preview-backed-demo cases.
triggers: before-only and before/after findings must be kept separate
implemented vs recommended wording needs explicit discipline
boundaries: structured dossier is source of truth
evidence required for factual review claims
notes: Use issue labels such as clarity, trust, conversion-friction, information-architecture and truthfulness.
Do not describe preview-backed changes where no after evidence exists.
